name: Nanjing Sanchao Advanced Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Sanchao Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures diamond and CBN tools for semiconductor and photovoltaic industries. It offers electroplated diamond wire saws, precision tools, cutting fluids, and diamond and CBN grinding wheels. The company provides its products for cutting, grinding, and polishing of silicon, sapphire, quartz, neodymium iron, boron, ferrite materials, ceramics, glass, hard alloy, and hard brittle materials. In addition, it offers ultra-fine and precision silicon slicing diamond wires, as well as professional technical services. Nanjing Sanchao Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Nanjing, China.
